_about: R3 fixture — a normalized Figma frame-export (the shape /pb:init --figma produces via the Figma MCP and resolve_frame.py consumes). Used by tests/r3_figma_entry.py to exercise frame → screen resolution + gaps.md end to end. 'button'/'text-input' map to known DS components; the other two are unmapped and must become gaps, never invented.
